---
title: "How do researchers in Spain wish to be evaluated?"
date: 2022-02-23
description: "Survey results from 875 Spanish academic researchers on their preferred evaluation criteria across 39 dimensions."
categories: [Opinions, Scholarly Communication, Publications]
---

*Content to be migrated from [pandelisperakakis.info](https://pandelisperakakis.info/2022/02/23/how-do-researchers-in-spain-wish-to-be-evaluated/).*

<!-- Paste the full post content here -->
